segments.text: Everything but me
But here with stones, I return to boulder
Tyler ain't the type to let a little scratch get mulled over
Pressure built,
he meant to burst,
I just got colder
Weight of the world, it's me on my shoulders
Even on my shittiest day,
these hands don't shake
You get what you give, I get what I take
Had a knife in my back,
still ate off the same plate
Now I walk in like the building,
got my name on the gate
Bad handle, I made the cars look loaded
Pain came back for what I owed,
I told it to count close
Every scar, I got a story, I don't care
Who knows,
it turned to life,
full of cracks in the armor I molded in
They couldn't shed in my will,
now they shed in my name
No longer playing, now I'm coding the game
Built a throne from the wreckage,
let them study the frame
They were betting on the break,
now they're scared of the change
I was made to break
Every lock, every limit, every chain in my way
Made to break
Not bend, not fall, not fade
Pressure built,
he meant to burst,
I get what you give
It on me, watch the pressure obey
You can call me demons, I call it battle made
They were waiting on a body,
I became the barricade
I was made to break
Everything but me
You call it trauma, I call it repetition
Brain kept talking,
I'd stop giving it permission
I don't need your pity, I need better opposition
They keep praying for the fall,
like it's some kind of revolution
Life kept screaming till it's knuckle split
I got bored of getting hit,
made a joke out of it
Fear got old,
pain went quiet,
doubt lost its grip
Now the worst day,
see me coming,
then they call and say
Every shot that they sent, only sharp in my aim
I don't carry my damage, I make damage behave
Tried to bury me alive,
I put a stage in the grave
Now the dirt on my name,
got them screaming my name
I don't wait on luck, I put a boot on fate
Every loss came heavy, I just had it to the way
They kept aiming for the cracks,
trying to widen the break
Now the damage,
I don't need your pity,
I just had it to the way
Damage holds me up, motherfucker, I'm reinforced
I was made to break
Every lock, every limit, every chain in my way
Made to break
Not bend, not fall, not fade
Pressure on me, watch the pressure obey
You can call me damage, I call it battle made
They were waiting on a body,
I became a barricade
I was made to break
Everything but me
Tried to break me, I break back
Pile it on, now you dab
Turn the pain into a weapon,
turn the pressure into impact
No collapse,
no retreat,
I don't beg,
I don't ask
I'm the product of the worst shit
And I came out built to last
Tyler!
Every lock, every limit, every chain in my way
Made to break
Not bend, not fall, not fade
Pressure on me, watch the pressure obey
You can call me damage, I call it battle made
They were waiting on a body,
I became a barricade
I was made to break
Everything but me
They were waiting on a body,
I came out built to last
